case_title: ALEXANDER MORALES ET AL VS. MERCEDES-BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE TWO PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. THE TWO DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH ARMIN ZIPPGELE (TITLE: SERVICE MANAGER). THE DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH KYLE BISSADA (TITLE: COURTESY FLEET MANAGER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY MORALES, ALEXANDER MORALES, HUGO AS TO DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORALES, ALEXANDER MORALES, HUGO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00- SERVED FEB-12-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO
